_doc: Gate C registry: per-edge workflows whose hardcoded choice options must stay in sync with the deployable edge matrices (GitHub Actions cannot compute choice options dynamically). scripts/checks/workflow-edge-coverage.py enforces that every deployable edge appears as an option (modulo explicit opt_out_edges with a reason), and that no opt_out is stale. Adding a deployable edge to deploy/aws/stage0/edge-targets.json or deploy/aws/lightsail/edge-targets-lightsail.json fails preflight until the workflow covers it or opts it out here.

opt_out_edges.reason: pg_dump refresh piloted on us1 only; fleet-wide cadence is a separate ops decision
